notifySubtitle: Be the first to know when this service becomes available. We'll send you an email as soon as we launch!

repair.name: Device Repair Service
repair.tagline: Professional repair services for your devices
repair.description: Get your devices fixed by certified technicians. Submit repair requests online, receive transparent price estimates, and track your repair status from submission to completion. We offer both in-store and courier pickup options.
steps: Certified technicians for all major brands
Store drop-off or courier pickup options

rent.name: Device Rental Service
rent.tagline: Flexible rental plans for every need
rent.description: Try the latest devices without the commitment of buying. Choose from our wide catalog of smartphones, laptops, and tablets. Rent monthly, upgrade anytime, and return with ease — no long-term contracts required.
steps: Browse our catalog of latest devices
Get delivered right to your door
